summary: 7 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Grace
film.announcement: Crime thriller marking Inevitable Studios' first feature film, co-written by and starring Millicent Simmonds from the A Quiet Place franchise.

film.title: Egg Baby
film.announcement: Romantic comedy acquired by Amazon MGM Studios for Prime Video release, starring Ariana Greenblatt and directed by Natalia Anderson.

film.title: Corpus
film.announcement: NYC nightlife thriller set in the 1990s from debut director Corrin Evans, premiering at Fantasia International Film Festival with Yellow Veil Pictures handling world sales.

film.title: Monsanto Legal Drama
film.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Laura Dern, LaKeith Stanfield, Greg Kinnear, David Duchovny, Melonie Diaz, Bilal Hasna, Julia McDermott, director John Lee Hancock
film.announcement: Courtroom drama about landmark legal trial against U.S. chemical company Monsanto, directed by John Lee Hancock with ensemble cast additions announced.

film.title: Shots! Shots! Shots!
film.announcement: Action comedy starring Jason Momoa acquired by Amazon MGM Studios, previously in development at Universal Studios.

film.title: The Death of Robin Hood
film.announcement: Robin Hood adaptation directed by Michael Sarnoski and starring Hugh Jackman as a murderous outlaw; director also adapting Death Stranding for A24.

film.title: Heartstopper Forever
film.announcement: Netflix film wrapping up the Heartstopper series, starring Kit Connor as Nick and Joe Locke as Charlie.

tv.title: The Audicity
tv.talent: Miriam Shor (cast as Randy Flemming in Season 2)
tv.announcement: Miriam Shor joins Season 2 cast as FBI Agent Randy Flemming, a character introduced in the Season 1 finale.
